com.pdfsolid.conversion.base

Enum ErrorCode

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<ErrorCode>
      • com.pdfsolid.conversion.base.ErrorCode
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<ErrorCode>

    public enum ErrorCode
extends java.lang.Enum<ErrorCode>

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      CANCEL
      Conversion process was canceled.
      COMPRESS_ERROR
      Folder compression failed.
      CONVERTING
      Currently executing conversion task.
      EXPIRE
      The resource (e.g., license, token) has expired.
      FILE_ERROR
      File cannot be found or could not be opened.
      IMAGE_DATA_EMPTY
      The image data is empty or not provided.
      IMAGE_INVALID
      The image is invalid or corrupted.
      IMAGE_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT
      The image format is not supported (e.g., not RGB, YUV, etc.).
      IMAGE_WIDTH_HEIGHT_ERROR
      The image width or height is invalid (e.g., less than or equal to zero).
      INVALID_ARG
      Invalid argument provided.
      INVALID_HANDLE
      The handle is invalid, possibly uninitialized or already released.
      INVALID_TABLE
      The table data is invalid or null.
      IO_ERROR
      System I/O error.
      LICENSE_CONCURRENCY_EXCEEDED
      The current conversion concurrency exceeds the license limit.
      LICENSE_EXPIRED
      The license has expired.
      LICENSE_FILE_READ_FAILED
      Failed to read license file.
      LICENSE_ILLEGAL_ACCESS
      Illegal access to the API interface.
      LICENSE_INVALID
      The license is invalid.
      LICENSE_MISMATCH
      The license does not match the device, module, or version.
      LICENSE_OCR_PERMISSION_DENY
      The license does not have OCR permissions.
      LICENSE_PAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
      The current conversion pages exceed the license limit.
      LICENSE_PERMISSION_DENY
      The license does not have the function permission.
      LICENSE_QUOTA_CORRUPTED
      The quota persistence file has been tampered with.
      LICENSE_UNINITIALIZED
      License has not been initialized.
      LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_API
      The current license does not support calling this API.
      LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_DEVICE
      The license does not support the device id.
      LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_ID
      The license does not support the application id.
      LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_PLATFORM
      The license does not support the current platform.
      MISSING_ARG
      A required argument is missing.
      MODEL_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED
      The model format is not supported by this system or SDK.
      MODEL_FUNCTION_NOT_SUPPORTED
      The model does not support the requested function or operation.
      MODEL_INVALID_FORMAT
      The model file format is invalid or corrupted.
      MODEL_SDK_MISMATCH
      The model is incompatible with the current SDK version.
      NO_TABLE
      No tables found in the source file.
      OCR_FAILURE
      Failed to call OCR recognition.
      OUT_OF_MEMORY_ERROR
      Out-of-memory error occurs.
      PDF_FORMAT_ERROR
      Format is invalid.
      PDF_PAGE_ERROR
      PDF page failed to load.
      PDF_PASSWORD_ERROR
      Invalid password.
      PDF_SECURITY_ERROR
      PDF document is encrypted by some unsupported security handler.
      SUCCESS
      Success, and no error occurs.
      UNKNOWN
      Unknown error.

      int getValue()

      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.

      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • SUCCESS

        public static final ErrorCode SUCCESS
        Success, and no error occurs.

      • CANCEL

        public static final ErrorCode CANCEL
        Conversion process was canceled.

      • FILE_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode FILE_ERROR
        File cannot be found or could not be opened.

      • PDF_PASSWORD_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode PDF_PASSWORD_ERROR
        Invalid password. Usually, this error may occur when loading a PDF document with password. When meet this, user should load document again with correct password.

      • PDF_PAGE_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode PDF_PAGE_ERROR
        PDF page failed to load.

      • PDF_FORMAT_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode PDF_FORMAT_ERROR
        Format is invalid. For files, this may also mean that file is corrupted.

      • PDF_SECURITY_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode PDF_SECURITY_ERROR
        PDF document is encrypted by some unsupported security handler.

      • OUT_OF_MEMORY_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode OUT_OF_MEMORY_ERROR
        Out-of-memory error occurs.

      • IO_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode IO_ERROR
        System I/O error.

      • COMPRESS_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode COMPRESS_ERROR
        Folder compression failed.

      • LICENSE_INVALID

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_INVALID
        The license is invalid.

      • LICENSE_EXPIRED

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_EXPIRED
        The license has expired.

      • LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_PLATFORM

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_PLATFORM
        The license does not support the current platform.

      • LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_ID

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_ID
        The license does not support the application id.

      • LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_DEVICE

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_DEVICE
        The license does not support the device id.

      • LICENSE_PERMISSION_DENY

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_PERMISSION_DENY
        The license does not have the function permission.

      • LICENSE_UNINITIALIZED

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_UNINITIALIZED
        License has not been initialized.

      • LICENSE_ILLEGAL_ACCESS

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_ILLEGAL_ACCESS
        Illegal access to the API interface.

      • LICENSE_FILE_READ_FAILED

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_FILE_READ_FAILED
        Failed to read license file.

      • LICENSE_OCR_PERMISSION_DENY

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_OCR_PERMISSION_DENY
        The license does not have OCR permissions.

      • LICENSE_CONCURRENCY_EXCEEDED

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_CONCURRENCY_EXCEEDED
        The current conversion concurrency exceeds the license limit.

      • LICENSE_PAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_PAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
        The current conversion pages exceed the license limit.

      • LICENSE_QUOTA_CORRUPTED

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_QUOTA_CORRUPTED
        The quota persistence file has been tampered with.

      • NO_TABLE

        public static final ErrorCode NO_TABLE
        No tables found in the source file.

      • OCR_FAILURE

        public static final ErrorCode OCR_FAILURE
        Failed to call OCR recognition.

      • CONVERTING

        public static final ErrorCode CONVERTING
        Currently executing conversion task.

      • INVALID_ARG

        public static final ErrorCode INVALID_ARG
        Invalid argument provided.

      • INVALID_HANDLE

        public static final ErrorCode INVALID_HANDLE
        The handle is invalid, possibly uninitialized or already released.

      • MODEL_INVALID_FORMAT

        public static final ErrorCode MODEL_INVALID_FORMAT
        The model file format is invalid or corrupted.

      • MODEL_FUNCTION_NOT_SUPPORTED

        public static final ErrorCode MODEL_FUNCTION_NOT_SUPPORTED
        The model does not support the requested function or operation.

      • MODEL_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED

        public static final ErrorCode MODEL_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED
        The model format is not supported by this system or SDK.

      • MODEL_SDK_MISMATCH

        public static final ErrorCode MODEL_SDK_MISMATCH
        The model is incompatible with the current SDK version.

      • IMAGE_DATA_EMPTY

        public static final ErrorCode IMAGE_DATA_EMPTY
        The image data is empty or not provided.

      • IMAGE_WIDTH_HEIGHT_ERROR

        public static final ErrorCode IMAGE_WIDTH_HEIGHT_ERROR
        The image width or height is invalid (e.g., less than or equal to zero).

      • IMAGE_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT

        public static final ErrorCode IMAGE_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT
        The image format is not supported (e.g., not RGB, YUV, etc.).

      • IMAGE_INVALID

        public static final ErrorCode IMAGE_INVALID
        The image is invalid or corrupted.

      • EXPIRE

        public static final ErrorCode EXPIRE
        The resource (e.g., license, token) has expired.

      • MISSING_ARG

        public static final ErrorCode MISSING_ARG
        A required argument is missing.

      • LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_API

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_UNSUPPORTED_API
        The current license does not support calling this API.

      • LICENSE_MISMATCH

        public static final ErrorCode LICENSE_MISMATCH
        The license does not match the device, module, or version.

      • INVALID_TABLE

        public static final ErrorCode INVALID_TABLE
        The table data is invalid or null.

      • UNKNOWN

        public static final ErrorCode UNKNOWN
        Unknown error.

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static ErrorCode[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (ErrorCode c : ErrorCode.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static ErrorCode valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      • getValue

        public int getValue()

      • fromInt

        public static ErrorCode fromInt(int value)
